ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( $Permission.BD_Bypass_Automation != TRUE, CONTAINS(RecordType.Name,'Informatics'),OR(AND(ISNEW(),NOT(CONTAINS(TEXT(Type),'Renewal'))),ISCHANGED(StageName)),
OR( CONTAINS(TEXT(StageName),'Stage 2'), CONTAINS(TEXT(StageName),'Stage 3'), CONTAINS(TEXT(StageName),'Stage 4'), CONTAINS(TEXT(StageName),'Stage 5'), CONTAINS(TEXT(StageName),'Stage 6'), CONTAINS(TEXT(StageName),'Closed Won') ), OR( ISPICKVAL(Application_Segment__c,''), ISPICKVAL(Application_Market__c,''), ISPICKVAL(Application__c,'') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_061: Please enter Application, Application Market, Application Segment for Stage - 2 and higher opportunities
